case_title: TARRI TANAKA VS. GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CALDWELL, MICHAEL T SUBSTITUTED FOR GRIFFIS, DAVID D AS ATTORNEY FOR TANAKA, TARRI
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT PLAN 1 JURY REQUESTED BY THE PLT. FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-18-2002 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR LYNN ALLYN ALTSHULER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-17-2002 THROUGH OCT-15-2002.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-11-2002.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR VALERIE JAN HIGGINS.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANAKA, TARRI AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE, HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-01-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-03-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
